_readme: provider: use 'mock' on a laptop without SSH; use 'ssh' on office/GMC with real hosts in sources.json. See providers/factory.py and providers/ssh_provider.py.
_ssh_notes: ssh_strict_host_key_checking: accept-new | yes | no. ssh_extra_args: optional list e.g. ["-i", "/path/key"].
_services_readme: Service-layer settings for the new controlled operations workflow. Keep these adapter-driven so local laptop and office deployment differ by config, not code.
_service_mariadb_notes: When service_db_backend is mariadb: set service_mariadb_host, service_mariadb_user, service_mariadb_database (default tLSF). Password via service_mariadb_password or env OPSCORE_MARIADB_PASSWORD. Read-only: apply/rollback still need json backend.
_service_gmc_notes: When service_request_backend is gmc, service_gmc_requests_root is the LSF10CFG directory containing REQ-<n> folders (default in code: /opt/platform/gmc/modCFG/work/.requests/LSF10CFG).
